summary: Premium restrictions testing iteration - verified all premium features are locked for free users via API testing and code review

issues: Added CSS styling for .health-btn.locked class to make locked state more visually distinct

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ server.py (lines 1271-1310): Health log POST correctly returns 403 with 'Premium krävs för hälsologgen' message for free users
✅ server.py (lines 1293-1303): Health log GET correctly returns empty array for free users
✅ server.py (lines 946-961): Flock creation correctly returns 403 when free user already has 1 flock
✅ server.py (lines 866-898): Feature preferences GET correctly returns can_customize: false for free users
✅ server.py (lines 900-942): Feature preferences PUT correctly returns 403 for free users
✅ server.py (lines 1331-1365): Hatching module correctly returns 403 for free users
✅ Hens.tsx (lines 614-631): Health log button shows locked state (.health-btn.locked) when isPremium=false
✅ Hens.tsx (lines 304-309): handleSaveFlock correctly shows premium error modal on 403 response

success_rate.frontend: Verified via code review - Google OAuth required for UI testing

seed_data_creation: Test hens and flocks created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All premium restrictions verified working correctly. Default user is NOT premium (trial expired). Web frontend requires Google OAuth for UI testing. Test file test_premium_restrictions.py can be used for regression testing.

POST /api/health-logs - Premium restrict.message: Premium krävs för hälsologgen. Uppgradera för att spåra hälsa per höna.

POST /api/flocks - Flock limit (max 1).message: Gratis-konto tillåter endast 1 flock. Uppgradera till Premium för obegränsat antal.

PUT /api/feature-preferences - Premium o.message: Premium krävs för att anpassa funktioner

Frontend Hens.tsx - Locked health button.details: Button shows '🔒 Hälsologg (Premium)' with .health-btn.locked class when isPremium=false

Frontend handleSaveFlock - 403 handling.details: Shows alert with premium message and navigates to /premium on 403 response

api_tests_performed.response: {is_premium: false, subscription_id: null, plan: null, expires_at: null}
